feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Live Process Import Error
entry.content:
Importing a Live Process Project results in an error without any further information other than asking to raise an incident which I anyway plan to do, checking if anyone else has seen this error and suggest what possibly is going wrong or missing. 

Error: [customui] [ERROR] Deploying in org "dcd43088trial_sk-btp-kpqxpqu9" and space "SPACE"

Live Process Project being added: Project Approval and Release

Once added I am expecting to see this under Lobby but there is nothing visible, also what I have noticed is some service instances getting created under BTP related to this Process.

Thanks

Sreenivas

entry.title: How to access Work Zone Content from the Configuration Editor?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

first time posting, so please excuse possible mistakes in posting this question. 

I'm facing the following problem. I developed an UI Integration Card in SAP Business Application Studio, which makes use of the Configuration Editor, when imported into SAP Work Zone AE. Despite the shown possibilities, I don't understand how I can make content, residing in a Work Zone workspace, accessable in this Configuration Editor. What I'm aiming for, would be something similar to the Configuration Editor of the Rotating Banner Widget: 

I would appreciate it very much, if someone could nudge me into the right direction on how to face this problem. What I saw by inspecting our Work Zone instance, is the content_ajax calls made by Work Zone to fetch the content data. But how I could make them usable in the Configuration Editor, is out of my current understanding. 

Thank you very much in advance. 

Max

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition SAPUI5 SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: Failed to scribe a free SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

Already see the SAP Build Process Automation in Service Marketplace of my trial account for Sep. 12 course preparation. Double Click > Create > Free subscription plan > Failed (twice).

https://cockpit.hanatrial.ondemand.com/trial/#/globalaccount/144e0694-2739-4573-aff6-6ae6f79aa033/subaccount/52546dec-95f5-4614-b67b-b378415a0669/service-marketplace&//detail/c63b63c8-8781-4afb-9d4b-f22d4c7ff76b/?layout=TwoColumnsMidExpanded

Kindly help. Thanks!

BR,

Sylvie

entry.title: Problem in the condition record detrmination in the billing document.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a problem in the condition record detrmination in the billing document.

I have a pricing precdure linked with a sales order type and billing type  and the order item is relevance for delicvery related billing.

The scenario is the pricing type update the pricing in the billing documnet while creating but when we create collective billing for the same customer there is a condition type detrmine a condition record by the right way in the analysis but in the amount it detrmines the condition record by the wrong way.

Note: The pricing type in the copy control between the delivery and the billing document is "C".

entry.title: SAP FICO Cookbook
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm looking for a SAP FICO Cookbook as a spreadsheet (MS Excel), if you have some with Baseline Integration based details on Best Practices.

It'll be very helpful to proceed for my tasks as Consultant.

Looking forward.

entry.title: Deploy SAPUI5 app to S4HANA cloud system
entry.content:
Is it possible to deploy SAPUI5 app to s4hana cloud system.

I only found ways of deploy to Cloud Foundry and ABAP repository (on-premise) system.

If possible, could you please provide me step by step documentation.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Missing SAP Datasphere in Trial Account
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am using the Trial account of SAP BTP Cockpit, however there is not SAP Datasphere in "Add Service Plans". 

How can I add it? I would like to test it. 

Thank you

entry.title: Embedding S4 Custom Fiori app inside BTP Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,
I would like to embed/load S/4HANA Custom Fiori App inside BTP hosted freestyle Fiori App in a container or iframe. I was investigating if this is doable, flow is that user wants to load the S/4HANA deployed Fiori app from the Custom SAPUI5 app deployed in BTP based on some criteria with some parameter on click of a button on next screen which will be detail screen wrapping up the embedded Fiori app from S/4HANA by passing the required URL parameter, is there any way this can be achieved through standard services on BTP or is it doable?

Any point of view or suggestions are most welcome.

Thanks, Siddharth

SAP Business Technology Platform SAPUI5 SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Integration Suite not able to subscription Failed Issue
entry.content:
Please help on the below issue

You can't subscribe to the service as decommissioning is in progress. Please try again after decommissioning is
completed.

Error Code: 400
Failing subscription request because decommissioning is in progress for appPlan: [trial], tenantId: [931697af-b464-47a6-9f02-00729fa470bc], subdomain: [85f06530trial]
 
 
Thanks,
Balakrishna

entry.title: How to use Standard API from BAS
entry.content:
I would like to use Standard API from BAS script.

for example i want to retrieve Material Documents data from s4hana cloud system and use in BAS.

Then, can I use Material Documents API in BAS? How can I try to use API?

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Attempting to retrieve data using SQLQueries with more than one parameter returns no data
entry.content:
Working with the service layer and I have created an sql query to expect 2 parameters, as below:



While attempting to run the query via GET request, the response returns no value. However I have some data that should be retrieved.



(I created another query with hard coded values and it returns data as expected- below screenshot)

 

I am not sure what the issue is

entry.title: Process Automation: Unattended agent is disconnected automatically
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created an automated process in SAP Build Process Automation. The process is started with a scheduled timer. The process works exactly fine when my computer is active and I can see that the agent is active.

However, when I do not have my computer "active", the agent is automatically put to disconnected. When I go to Monitor > Automated Jobs, I can see that the job is set to "Ready" with the comment "Your job cannot be distributed because no unattended agent is available". Also, if I put the agent to unattended and close my computer, I get the same error because the agent is set to "Disconnected".

Is it possible to let an agent run the process even though your computer is off?

Thanks,

Stefanie

entry.title: Updating Extension Field with External Hook in SAP Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working on updating an extension field called zWebSite in SAP, where I want to store the website obtained from the Organizational Unit entity using ExtenalHook PreHook. To achieve this, I developed a small application in SAP BTP. However, I am encountering an issue with the following error:

Custom logic error: FAILED_PRECONDITION: Error raised from the external system with HTTP Status Code: 500 "Request failed with status code 422".

My code(JS):

I am wondering about the correct structure for the update. Specifically, I would like to know:

Is it necessary to send the entire currentImage data in the update request, or is it sufficient to only send the extension field zWebSite?

I appreciate any help or suggestions you can provide.

Thank you!

entry.title: Error When execute API : Cannot connect to host zeus.hana.prod.eu-central-1
entry.content:
Hello

In step 4 "Execute API" of the tutorial "Expose Integration Flow Endpoint as API and Test the Flow" I have the following error message

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?><error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata"><code/><message xml:lang="en">

Exception [EclipseLink-4002] (Eclipse Persistence Services - 2.7.8.v20201217-ecdf3c32c4): org.eclipse.persistence.exceptions.DatabaseException
Internal Exception: com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: Cannot connect to jdbc:sap://zeus.hana.prod.eu-central-1.whitney.dbaas.ondemand.com:22716 [Cannot connect to host zeus.hana.prod.eu-central-1.whitney.dbaas.ondemand.com/18.196.126.43:22716 [java.net.ConnectException: error 111 - Connection refused], -813.].
Error Code: -813
Call: SELECT PRODUCT_ID, CATEGORY, CATEGORY_NAME, CURRENCY_CODE, DIMENSION_DEPTH, DIMENSION_HEIGHT, DIMENSION_UNIT, DIMENSION_WIDTH, LONG_DESCRIPTION, NAME, PICTURE_URL, PRICE, QUANTITY_UNIT, SHORT_DESCRIPTION, SUPPLIER_ID, WEIGHT, WEIGHT_UNIT, SUPPLIER_SUPPLIER_ID FROM ESPM_PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_ID LIKE ? ESCAPE '\'
bind => [1 parameter bound]
Query: ReadAllQuery(referenceClass=Product sql="SELECT PRODUCT_ID, CATEGORY, CATEGORY_NAME, CURRENCY_CODE, DIMENSION_DEPTH, DIMENSION_HEIGHT, DIMENSION_UNIT, DIMENSION_WIDTH, LONG_DESCRIPTION, NAME, PICTURE_URL, PRICE, QUANTITY_UNIT, SHORT_DESCRIPTION, SUPPLIER_ID, WEIGHT, WEIGHT_UNIT, SUPPLIER_SUPPLIER_ID FROM ESPM_PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_ID LIKE ? ESCAPE '\'")</message></error>

entry.title: An authorization token of destination ads-rest-api has expired.
entry.content:
Hi, CAP Expert,

I deployed an application in cloud foundry . At the begin the application works fine . But after a few minutes ,some function begins to not work .I checked the backend log. There is error like "An authorization token of destination ads-rest-api has expired. Please ensure that you don't reuse destination objects in your code for longer periods of time." So the function call /getTemplates() failed . I am not sure that I implements Resiliance of cloud sdk will resolve this issue. If you experience this already, please share your solution for this .

entry.title: SAP BTP: How to set up alert on database resident memory and database used memory
entry.content:
We need help.
We are currently using SAP BTP and are looking for a way to automatically monitor the memory used in the database (database resident memory, database used memory), and send an alert and email when a certain amount of usage is detected.

Here are the specifications:

  • Using HANA Cloud as the database.
  • Currently, each memory is manually monitored from the Memory Usage section in HANA Cockpit.

Since the memory we want to set alerts for is standard, I thought there might be a default alert function, so I looked in HANA Cockpit under alert > alert definition, but I couldn't find it.

I would like to know if this is something that should be implemented by default in the alert definition, or if it is something that users need to create. If we need to create the alert, please let us know the steps to do so (preferably without using SQL commands, if possible).

entry.title: Please let me know which time synchronization solution use in BTP cloud foundry
entry.content:
We have requested from customer what time synchronization solution we use. (example NTP: network time protocol)
I couldn't find what functions were provided in the manual (BTP Cloud foundry).
Customer want answer to their questions before system open and use.
Are there any solutions like NTP in BTP Cloud foundry that we use? we need even simple answer (example: we control time sync in BTP level)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial API management configuration
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting the following error when tried configuring API management capability of Integration suite. Any advice on how to configure this?

entry.title: SAP Dynamic Forms Merge Functionality
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have tried creating a Form using form builder in SAP Dynamic Forms and we are able to successfully do it. We have also created a Template separately. When we are trying to Merge the template into the form we are not getting the merge option in the Form Builder. Attaching the screenshot for your reference.

How it should be like: 

 

We are Actually Getting like: 

 

 

Could you please help us on the steps how to get the Merge option.

Thanks,

V Pranaya Panni

entry.title: Typescript + cds typer are throwing the error Property 'before' does not exist on type 'Service'
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I'm updating the libraries of my fullstack application and found that something is not working well. I added cds-typer by using cds add command. I updated all libraries to last version

"@sap/cds": "^8.2.3",
"@sap/cds-dk": "^8.2.3",
"@cap-js/cds-typer": ">=0.26.0"
 
But it seems it's not recognising the handlers from the service, please can you support on this ??
To execute the code i vscode I'm using cds-tsx command.
 Thanks a lot in advance.
